title: Automate contact field by email address
excerpt: If I have an email address coming into a deals board through Zapier, is it possible to automatically link a contact based on that email address?

posts.author: weslby (Wesley)
posts.cookedHtml: If I have an email address coming into a deals board through Zapier, is it possible to automatically link a contact based on that email address?

posts.author: sachinkarma (sachin kumar karma)
posts.cookedHtml:
To link a contact based on an email address coming into a deals board through Zapier, we can implement a two-step automation process. First, when a new deal is created in the deals board, Zapier will search your CRM or contact management system for a matching email address. If a match is found, the contact information will be linked to the deal automatically. This ensures that every new deal is associated with the correct contact, streamlining your workflow and maintaining data accuracy.

  • Trigger: New deal creation in the deals board.
  • Action: Search for contact by email in the CRM.
  • Action: Link the found contact to the new deal.

posts.author: Fantasy-Media-Team (Fantasy Media Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
